title: phleum alpinum var. commutatum
intro: Phleum alpinum var. commutatum, also known as the alpine timothy grass or mountain meadow grass, is a plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Phleum alpinum var. commutatum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Phleum alpinum var. commutatum can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
